RemoteEngine.connectionNameHelp: After filling in, this record will be saved to the connection history for quick calls later

PEMExample.pemContent: When starting the core server with yak grpc --tls, the RootCA will be printed to the screen. Copy and paste it into this input box:

PEMHint.saveHistoryNote: Note: {{appName}} will not upload the history to the internet
PEMHint.saveHistoryLocation: You can find the remote login information in your local directory (client directory)
